## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` and `uv run ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `uv run mypy` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed (EN at minimum; NL/FR appreciated)
